욥기 18:2.content: “How long will you hunt for words? Consider, and afterwards we will speak.

욥기 18:3.content: Why are we counted as animals, which have become unclean in your sight?

욥기 18:4.content: You who tear yourself in your anger, will the earth be forsaken for you? Or will the rock be removed out of its place?

욥기 18:5.content: “Yes, the light of the wicked will be put out. The spark of his fire won’t shine.

욥기 18:6.content: The light will be dark in his tent. His lamp above him will be put out.

욥기 18:7.content: The steps of his strength will be shortened. His own counsel will cast him down.

욥기 18:8.content: For he is cast into a net by his own feet, and he wanders into its mesh.

욥기 18:9.content: A snare will take him by the heel. A trap will catch him.

욥기 18:10.content: A noose is hidden for him in the ground, a trap for him on the path.

욥기 18:11.content: Terrors will make him afraid on every side, and will chase him at his heels.

욥기 18:12.content: His strength will be famished. Calamity will be ready at his side.

욥기 18:13.content: The members of his body will be devoured. The firstborn of death will devour his members.

욥기 18:14.content: He will be rooted out of the security of his tent. He will be brought to the king of terrors.

욥기 18:15.content: There will dwell in his tent that which is none of his. Sulfur will be scattered on his habitation.

욥기 18:16.content: His roots will be dried up beneath. His branch will be cut off above.

욥기 18:17.content: His memory will perish from the earth. He will have no name in the street.

욥기 18:18.content: He will be driven from light into darkness, and chased out of the world.

욥기 18:19.content: He will have neither son nor grandson among his people, nor any remaining where he lived.

욥기 18:20.content: Those who come after will be astonished at his day, as those who went before were frightened.

욥기 18:21.content: Surely such are the dwellings of the unrighteous. This is the place of him who doesn’t know God.”
